title: viola decumbens
intro: Viola decumbens, also known as the downy violet, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Violaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Western Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to the presence of iridoid glycosides and flavonoids. The herbal preparations of Viola decumbens, including infusions and decoctions, have been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other respiratory infections, while also providing potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation.
